so the the tool itself, and really the reasons behind it is, we had so rentable was our Ios, and then it was like 2 and a half years ago now that we started the Google business pro tool that recently rebranded to Maven AI.

So the reasons behind it is, customers were telling us that they were shifting a lot of their focus, maybe not fully away from Ios's, but towards the Google profiles, and really making sure that you're driving as much traffic to your property websites as possible.
So this tool helps to completely automate the whole process of posting on the profiles.
uploading floor plans.

So the feeds are really like the the source of truth.
For all of the information that we're pulling to create these posts down to pricing and availability.
But it's all syndicated directly with your feed.

So when I'm talking to ownership groups and clients, it's, why are we focusing so much on Google?
This is no surprise to you guys are marketing.
But we know Google dominates search overall.
So it's like 9 out of 10, Internet searches are done through Google.
And then Google tells us that the Google business profile itself has the highest influence overall on your local SEO.
So Google's actually using that the content that's on the profiles as one of the places that they're pulling information.
So when people are doing long tail keywords, Google is actually using the content on that profile to help answer those.
So that just speaks to the importance of getting these amenity keywords on your profile as many times as possible.
And then the last thing before jumping in is Google tells us that they reward based on a few different things.
So they're going to be increasing exposure.
You're going to rank higher if the content you're posting is relevant to your property.
They look at the frequency of how often you're posting, how often you're making these updates, and then the uniqueness of that content.
So are you reposting the same thing over and over?
Is it the same post that's on all of your profiles?
Or is it truly unique to your Google business profile for your property.
So this tool also helps to to fit all of these.
So relevancy, it's all property specific content frequency.
We're updating at least once a day with some property management softwares like Rent cafe.
We can actually update 4 times a day.
And then the uniqueness is we're creating unique posts every day.
